name: Slime
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the glue, 1 1/2 cups water, and food color until it is not sticky.
2. Separately dissolve the borax and 1/2 cup water. Add to the glue solution.
You will get a very thick clump of Slime where the two mix.
3. With clean hands, knead the Slime for about 10 minutes or so until fully mixed.
The more slimy this is, though, the more apt it is to get stuck in any fabric
it comes in contact with. If desired, add a bit more water and knead it in
for a looser texture.
